evals.prompt: How do I set up AdRoll retargeting for my Shopify store?
evals.expected_output: Step-by-step guide to installing AdRoll via the Shopify app, verifying pixel tracking, and creating a retargeting campaign

assertions.name: shopify_install
assertions.description: Explains installing AdRoll from the Shopify App Store and that it auto-syncs product catalog and installs pixel

assertions.name: audience_creation
assertions.description: Covers creating retargeting audiences from website visitors (e.g., cart abandoners, product viewers)

assertions.name: dynamic_retargeting
assertions.description: Mentions dynamic retargeting that automatically shows products the visitor viewed or carted

evals.prompt: What's the difference between AdRoll and RollWorks? We're a B2B SaaS company.
evals.expected_output: Explains that AdRoll is consumer/ecommerce-focused retargeting while RollWorks is the B2B ABM arm under the same parent company (NextRoll)

assertions.name: parent_company
assertions.description: Identifies NextRoll as the parent company of both AdRoll and RollWorks

assertions.name: b2b_distinction
assertions.description: Clarifies that RollWorks is the B2B ABM product with account-based targeting, HubSpot integration, and intent data

assertions.name: separate_products
assertions.description: Notes that RollWorks has separate pricing and features from consumer AdRoll

evals.prompt: I want to use the AdRoll API to programmatically create campaigns and pull performance reports. Where do I start?
evals.expected_output: API overview with authentication method, base URL, and key endpoints for campaign management and reporting

assertions.name: api_reference
assertions.description: Points to references/adroll-api-reference.md for full API documentation

assertions.name: auth_method
assertions.description: Explains OAuth 2.0 or Personal Access Token authentication at api.nextroll.com

assertions.name: reporting_api
assertions.description: Mentions the GraphQL Reporting API for cross-channel analytics
